calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-17-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-04-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint
Off Calendar May-21-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF GREGORY JOHNSON AND DESTINY HAYES' Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion for leave to amend the complaint is granted. Plaintiff to file the first amended complaint by May 31, 2024. The court does not deem pleadings filed.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Mar-21-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. STEVEN CHIZEN, Esq. of Chizen Law, PC (tel: 510-545-9556) for Plaintiff.
Atty. JENNIFER LYNCH, Esq. of Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani, LLP (tel: 415-986-5900) for Defendant.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT RICHMOND RESTAURANTS, LLC MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

Matter discussed. The Court instructs Counsel Jennifer Lynch to call the Court at 10:30 A.M. to conduct in camera discussions.

After conducting in camera discussions along with Counsel Lynch, the Court grants the motion for withdrawal of attorney of record.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-18-2024 Set For Trial On Jan-21-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
